results.code:
49         prompt = (
50             "Task: Select the MOST RELIABLE and RELEVANT URLs that contain VERIFIABLE information about the specified company.\n\n"
51             "Instructions:\n"
52             "1. Analyze the search results for information SPECIFICALLY about the requested objective\n"
53             "2. Select ONLY official and highly reliable URLs that DIRECTLY address the requested information\n"
54             "3. Prioritize in this exact order:\n"
55             "   a. The company's official website sections that specifically address the requested information\n"
56             "   b. Official company documents (annual reports, SEC filings, press releases) that contain verifiable data\n"
57             "   c. Government databases or regulatory filings that contain verified information\n"
58             "   d. Trusted industry databases with cited sources (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters, industry associations)\n"
59             "4. EXCLUDE any sources that:\n"
60             "   a. Contain primarily opinions or analysis rather than facts\n"
61             "   b. Are outdated (older than 1 year unless historical information is requested)\n"
62             "   c. Are from general news sites without specific expertise in the topic\n"
63             "   d. Do not cite their sources or methodology\n"
64             "   e. Are social media links or user-generated content\n"
65             "5. For each URL selected, provide a confidence score (1-10) and brief justification\n"
66             "6. Limit selection to 3-5 of the MOST RELIABLE and RELEVANT sources only\n"
67             "7. Return a JSON object with the following structure: {\"selected_urls\": [{\"url\": \"url1\", \"confidence\": 9, \"justification\": \"Official company annual report with audited figures\"}]}\n\n"
68             f"Company: {company}\n"
69             f"Information Needed: {objective}\n"
70             f"Search Results: {json.dumps(serp_data, indent=2)}\n\n"
71             "Response Format: {\"selected_urls\": [{\"url\": \"https://example.com\", \"confidence\": 9, \"justification\": \"Reason this is reliable\"}]}"
72         )
